Video.title: The Arnold's "A-Sea"

Video.title: Montauk-Inspired Calibu Vineyard

Video.summary: Mary Welch Fox brings her signature edge to what looks like a classic cottageŚuntil the door opens.
Video.title: Coloring Outside the Classic Cottage

Video.summary: Leah heads to Dana Spinola's posh pad and NFL veteran Matt Schaub's mega mansion.
Video.title: Dana Spinola & Matt Schaub

Video.summary: Leah heads to comedian George Wallace's hotel-chic penthouse and Superbowl MVP Hines Ward's contemporary crib.
Video.title: George Wallace & Hines Ward

Video.summary: Nina heads to Nashville, Tennessee to turn a 37-acre farm into a family homestead.
Video.title: Creating a Family Homestead

Video.summary: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.
Video.title: Building & Tending Your Garden

Video.title: A Bountiful Harvest

Video.summary: Hosts Tyler and Rachel kick off the competition by introducing the four teams and assigning their first challenge.
Video.title: Meet the Neighbors

Video.summary: The teams race through the local nursery to find the perfect plants to bring life to their budding backyard designs.
Video.title: Place It & Plant It

Video.summary: Tyler and Rachel challenge the teams to select items to upcycle and repurpose in their backyard designs.
Video.title: Ultimate Upcycles

Video.summary: The stakes are high as the teams strap on their toolbelts and plan their backyards builds.
Video.title: Backyard Builds

Video.summary: The judges challenge the remaining teams to craft and present a unique menu for a backyard party.
Video.title: Mastering the Menu

Video.summary: The remaining two teams prepare their winning menus for the final challenge.
Video.title: Best on the Block

Video.summary: Bridgett Mazer fuses modern design with the coastal colors and textures of Wilmington, North Carolina.
Video.title: Coastal Modern Waves

Video.title: "Mi Sue±o" Palm Springs Getaway

Video.title: Moody & Masculine Mid-Century Style

Video.title: Soul Mates

Video.title: Maegan's Reconnection

Video.summary: Casey takes on stunning stencil work as she steps into her confidence as a leader.
Video.title: Casey's Shadows Turned Light

Video.title: Kameron's Deep Dive

Video.summary: Darius Rucker brings together an all-star team to transform a historic mansion.
Video.title: No Place Like Home

Video.summary: Hospitality takes center stage when a Victorian ballroom gets a modern makeover.
Video.title: Sweet Tea & Southern Hospitality

Video.summary: Family traditions shine bright as the dining room gets its moment in the spotlight.
Video.title: Dinnertime Down South

Video.summary: Rest and relaxation are front and center as the master suite gets a new look.
Video.title: Unwinding & Weaving

Video.summary: Art and culture come together when a former vault is transformed into the ultimate music room.
Video.title: Hitting the High Notes

Video.summary: The Rucker home is finally ready for its big Charleston debut.
Video.title: Making History
